所有程序包的分层结构

类分层结构

  • java.lang.Object
    • cc.carm.lib.configuration.core.builder.AbstractConfigBuilder<T,B,P>
      • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bungee.builder.AbstractBungeeBuilder<T,B>
      • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bukkit.builder.AbstractCraftBuilder<T,B>
        • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bukkit.builder.item.ItemConfigBuilder
        • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bukkit.builder.serializable.SerializableBuilder<T>
        • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bukkit.builder.sound.SoundConfigBuilder
        • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bukkit.builder.title.TitleConfigBuilder
      • cc.carm.lib.configuration.core.builder.CommonConfigBuilder<T,B>
        • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.common.builder.message.MessageListBuilder<M,R,T,B>
          • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bungee.builder.message.BungeeMessageListBuilder<M>
          • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bukkit.builder.message.CraftMessageListBuilder<M>
        • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.common.builder.message.MessageValueBuilder<M,R,T,B>
          • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bungee.builder.message.BungeeMessageValueBuilder<M>
          • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bukkit.builder.message.CraftMessageValueBuilder<M>
    • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.common.data.AbstractText<R>
      • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bungee.data.MessageText
      • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bukkit.data.TextConfig
    • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bukkit.source.BukkitYAMLComments
    • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bungee.source.BungeeSectionWrapper (implements cc.carm.lib.configuration.core.source.ConfigurationWrapper)
    • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bungee.source.BungeeYAMLComments
    • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.common.utils.ColorParser
    • cc.carm.lib.configuration.core.builder.ConfigBuilder
      • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bungee.builder.BungeeConfigBuilder
      • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bukkit.builder.CraftConfigBuilder
    • cc.carm.lib.configuration.core.source.ConfigurationProvider<W>
      • cc.carm.lib.configuration.core.source.impl.FileConfigProvider<W>
        • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bungee.source.BungeeConfigProvider
        • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bukkit.source.CraftConfigProvider
          • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bukkit.source.BukkitConfigProvider
          • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.spigot.source.SpigotConfigProvider
    • cc.carm.lib.configuration.core.value.ConfigValue<T>
      • cc.carm.lib.configuration.core.value.impl.CachedConfigValue<T>
        • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bungee.BungeeConfigValue<T>
        • cc.carm.lib.configuration.core.value.type.ConfiguredList<V>
          • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.common.value.ConfigMessageList<M,T,R>
            • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bungee.value.ConfiguredMessageList<M>
            • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bukkit.value.ConfiguredMessageList<M>
        • cc.carm.lib.configuration.core.value.type.ConfiguredSection<V>
          • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bukkit.value.ConfiguredItem
          • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bukkit.value.ConfiguredTitle
        • cc.carm.lib.configuration.core.value.type.ConfiguredValue<V>
          • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.common.value.ConfigMessage<M,T,R>
            • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bungee.value.ConfiguredMessage<M>
            • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bukkit.value.ConfiguredMessage<M>
          • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bukkit.value.ConfiguredSound
        • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bukkit.CraftConfigValue<T>
          • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bukkit.value.ConfiguredSerializable<T>
    • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bukkit.source.CraftSectionWrapper (implements cc.carm.lib.configuration.core.source.ConfigurationWrapper)
    • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bukkit.data.ItemConfig

      • cc.carm.lib.mineconfiguration.bukkit.builder.message.CraftMessageBuilder
